title: A Conceit
content:
I hide my love,
    I will not say her name.
    And yet since I confess
    I love, her name is told.
    You know that if I love
    It must be ... Whom?

    From the Arabic of Ebn Kalakis Abu El Fath Nasrallah (eleventh century).
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator) delivers a powerful performance in "A Conceit"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
